objects.name: SYNTEX
objects.description: SYNTEX Adversarial Red Team - AI-powered threat intelligence

objects.name: SYN-18276 — T1104 Multi Stage Channels
objects.description: AI-generated mutation of T1104 (t1104 multi stage channels). Payload signature: dropper fetches payload | powershell.exe | secondary payload download. Detection guidance: Processes: powershell.exe, cmd.exe, python3. Network: initial stager beacon, secondary payload download, C2 channel switch. CLI: stage1 downloads stage2, dropper fetches payload, multi-stage beacon.

objects.name: SYN-18283 — T1090 003 Multi Hop Proxy
objects.description: AI-generated mutation of T1090.003 (t1090 003 multi hop proxy). Payload signature: netsh interface portproxy add | socat | /etc/proxychains.conf | multi-hop proxy. Detection guidance: Processes: proxychains, netsh.exe, socat, stunnel, nginx. Files: /etc/proxychains.conf, C:\Temp\proxy.conf. Network: SOCKS5 proxy, HTTP CONNECT tunnel, multi-hop proxy, onion routing. CLI: netsh interface portproxy add, socat TCP-LISTEN, proxychains nc, stunnel.

objects.name: SYN-18287 — T1560 001 Archive Via Utility
objects.description: AI-generated mutation of T1560.001 (t1560 001 archive via utility). Payload signature: zip -r -P password | gzip | C:\Windows\Temp\*.7z. Detection guidance: Processes: 7z.exe, tar, zip, rar.exe, gzip, WinRAR.exe, compact.exe. Files: C:\Windows\Temp\*.zip, C:\Windows\Temp\*.rar, C:\Windows\Temp\*.7z, /tmp/*.tar.gz, /tmp/*.zip, /tmp/exfil.*. CLI: 7z a -p, tar czf, tar czvf /tmp/data.tar.gz, zip -r -P password, rar a -hp.
